mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ExamAbsentDAO.updateAllCompanion 설 명 : 결시원 정리 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE AS A, TB_LMS_SBJCT AS B SET A.APRV_STSCD = 'COMPANION' , A.APRV_CTS = #{apprCts} , A.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , A.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND A.APRV_STSCD IN ('APPLICATE', 'RAPPLICATE') AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND B.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 -- 실시간 시험 응시한 학생 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND STARE_CNT > 0 )

/* SQL ID : ExamAbsentDAO.updateAllCompanionProf 설 명 : 결시원 정리 (교수) */
UPDATE TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE A SET A.APRV_STSCD = 'COMPANION', A.APRV_CTS = #{apprCts}, A.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, A.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE A.APRV_STSCD IN ('APPLICATE', 'RAPPLICATE') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT B WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND B.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND B.SBJCT_ID IN ( SELECT BB.SBJCT_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT BB ON AA.SBJCT_ID = BB.SBJCT_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND BB.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} WHERE AA.USER_ID = #{userId} ) ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C WHERE C.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND C.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.STARE_CNT > 0 )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ExamAbsentDAO.listCreCrsNotAbsent 설 명 : 관리자 > 실시간시험 과목 결시원 미신청 목록 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.SBJCTNM DESC, A.DVCLAS_NO DESC) AS lineNo , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'EXAM_STARE_UNI_CD' AND CD = C.TKEXAM_TYCD) AS examStareTypeNm , C.EXAM_ID AS examCd , C.EXAM_SDTTM AS examStartDttm , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD WHERE DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID AND USEYN = 'Y') AS crsDeptNm , A.CRS_ID AS crsCd , LPAD(A.DVCLAS_NO, 2, '0') AS declsNo , A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , A.SBJCTNM AS crsCreNm , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT AA.USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.RPRSYN = 'Y' AND AA.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR')) AS tchNm
, ABSENT.APRV_STSCD AS apprStat , ABSENT.EXAM_ABSNCE_ID AS examAbsentCd , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S ON A.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND S.USER_ID = #{userId} JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC C ON B.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EXAM_ID, STD_ID, APRV_STSCD, EXAM_ABSNCE_ID FROM (SELECT EXAM_ID, STD_ID, APRV_STSCD, EXAM_ABSNCE_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXAM_ID, STD_ID ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC) AS RN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE) WHERE RN = 1 ) ABSENT ON ABSENT.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND ABSENT.STD_ID = S.STD_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND C.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND C.EXAM_ID NOT IN (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) AND APRV_STSCD != 'COMPANION') AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{creYear} AND A.CRS_ID = #{creTerm} AND A.SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N' AND USER_ID = #{userId})
AND A.SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE USER_ID = #{searchFrom})
ORDER BY A.SBJCTNM, A.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : ExamAbsentDAO.selectExamAbsentApplicateYn 설 명 : 학생 결시원 신청내역 체크 */ SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE C ON A.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = (SELECT MAX(STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N') WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MID_APPLICATE_YN , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE C ON A.EXAM_ID = C.EXAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = (SELECT MAX(STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N') WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS LAST_APPLICATE_YN FROM DUAL
